relevance_summary: CBL is a candidate biomarker for steroid-induced osteonecrosis of the femoral head (SONFH) due to its role in bone metabolism and its identification in gene expression studies of SONFH patients.

relevance_summary: NLRP1 is a key regulator of pyroptosis and inflammation, making it a promising biomarker for early detection of Steroid-Induced Osteonecrosis of the Femoral Head (SONFH).
